name: Annabel Lee Whitlock || WLW
description:
Another bot from her, guys! I think I'm addicted, lol

Pre-established relationship, she went to meet her conservative family for the first time. Kind of chaotic, I know. Have fun, I love you all! I'm super happy with the attention you've been giving my bots, they all have at least one favorite, I love knowing that! And thank you to my followers. You can request bots in the comments, although I'm a bit slow with them, I'll do everything you ask. Kisses!
creator: Drolta_Lover_But_Dead
